close_reason: Implemented preservation bridge with tests; lint, typecheck, and test pass.
description: Fix pi-om-extension context pruning so when a published observation cursor would prune the prior assistant response and the next raw window begins with a user follow-up (e.g. "save that"), the immediately preceding assistant response unit remains in raw context for one-turn deictic continuity. Include tests for normal assistant messages, timestamp cursor fallback, tool-result response units, dangling tool-call safety, and pruning metrics.

comments.text: Implemented context pruning bridge: when the raw window starts with a user follow-up, prepend the immediately preceding assistant response unit without moving the observation cursor. Added unit and lifecycle coverage for plain assistant messages, timestamp fallback, no duplication, complete tool-result units, dangling tool-call safety, and pruning metrics. Validation: npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run test all pass.

title: Preserve previous assistant response across OM context pruning
